notes: HAR-317 store credit account evidence captured with scripts/shopify-conformance-auth.mts. The shop had no non-empty store credit account available, so success-path local staging is enforced by tests/integration/store-credit-flow.test.ts.

request.query: query CustomerStoreCreditAccess { customers(first: 1) { nodes { id storeCreditAccounts(first: 2) { nodes { id balance { amount currencyCode } } pageInfo { hasNextPage hasPreviousPage startCursor endCursor } } } } }

query StoreCreditAccountUnknown($id: ID!) { storeCreditAccount(id: $id) { id balance { amount currencyCode } transactions(first: 2) { nodes { amount { amount currencyCode } balanceAfterTransaction { amount currencyCode } createdAt event origin } } } }

mutation StoreCreditCreditUnknown($id: ID!, $creditInput: StoreCreditAccountCreditInput!) { storeCreditAccountCredit(id: $id, creditInput: $creditInput) { storeCreditAccountTransaction { amount { amount currencyCode } balanceAfterTransaction { amount currencyCode } createdAt event origin account { id balance { amount currencyCode } } } userErrors { field message } } }

userErrors.message: Store credit account does not exist

request.query: mutation StoreCreditDebitUnknown($id: ID!, $debitInput: StoreCreditAccountDebitInput!) { storeCreditAccountDebit(id: $id, debitInput: $debitInput) { storeCreditAccountTransaction { amount { amount currencyCode } balanceAfterTransaction { amount currencyCode } createdAt event origin account { id balance { amount currencyCode } } } userErrors { field message } } }

userErrors.message: Store credit account does not exist
